description: The DesktopDisplayLayout component displays a list of display selection buttons for a user's monitor settup. It is used in the dash menu and only works in userspace.

fields.User: The user to get displays for.
fields.DisplayTemplate: the template to use when generating display selection buttons.
fields.ItemGenerated: usually the OnDisplayItemGenerated() sync delegate from DesktopControlDialog.

notes.title: DisplayItemHandler
notes.text: A Sync delegate of type Delegate<Display display, Slot itemRoot>
